# Wolfblanc Architects - Sverige

> Wolfblanc ar ett arkitektur- och designkontor med kontor i Stockholm. Vi ritar bostader, renoveringar, investeringsfastigheter och hospitality-projekt med internationell erfarenhet och nordisk precision. SAR/MSA registrerad. WELL AP-certifierad.

## Webbplats

- URL: https://wolfblanc.se
- Sprak: svenska (standard), engelska
- Typ: Arkitekturstudio

## Kontor

### Stockholm (Huvudkontor)
- Adress: Kungsgatan 9, 111 43 Stockholm, Sverige
- Telefon: +46 73 656 64 89
- E-post: info@wolfblanc.com
- Oppettider: mandag-fredag 09:00-18:00

## Meriter

- SAR/MSA registrerad (Sveriges Arkitekter)
- WELL AP-certifierad (design for halsa och valbefinnande)
- COAM N.25160 (Spanien)
- TEE N.168011 (Grekland)
- KTH (Kungliga Tekniska Hogskolan)
- ETSAM (Madrid)
- 20+ ars samlad erfarenhet

## Tjanster

1. Teknisk due diligence fore forvary - Vi hjalper kopare, investerare och family offices att forsta en fastighet innan de binder kapital.
2. Arkitektur & landskap - Byggnader och miljoer som ett integrerat system, fran koncept till fardigstallande.
3. Projektledning / nybyggnad / totalrenovering - Stark samordning, tydlig kommunikation och integrerade BIM-floden.
4. Bostadsinteriorer - Inomhusmiljoer anpassade till vardagligt bruk med omsorg om ljus, material och atmosfar.
5. Kommersiell strategi & interior - Hogpresterande miljoer for varumarken och investerare. Arbetsplatser, hospitality, showrooms och retail.
6. Stadsplanering & masterplanning - Platser, stadsdelar och offentliga miljoer med tydlig rumslig strategi.
7. BIM-konsultation - Digital precision i varje fas. Samordning, riskreducering och smartare beslut.
8. Valbefinnandekonsultation - WELL AP-konsulter som mater och optimerar luft, ljus, akustik och komfort.
9. Arkitektonisk visualisering - Visuellt material for beslut, tillstand, forsaljning och investerarkommunikation.

## Specialiserade tjanster

- For investerare: Strategisk arkitektur for hogpresterande fastigheter. Matbart ROI.
- For bostadsagare: Bostadsdesign och renovering med tydlig process.
- Fritidshus: Fritidsbostader utformade med hansyn till landskap, material och hallbarhet.

## Utvalda projekt

- Horizon - Privat kustboende. Landskap, skugga och vardagsbruk som ett system.
- K38 - Investeringslogik for lagenhet.
- Plato's Academy - Stadsdelsstrategi och urban studie.
- A75 - Renovering med ljus och logik for aterforsaljning.
- Norrsken - Nordisk precision i arbetsplatsdesign.
- Selva - Hospitality-atmosfar.
- Boadilla - Bostaden som metod.
- Nexus - Urban kontinuitet och kulturarv.
- Granolita - Estetisk rumsupplevelse inom gastronomi.
- Bistro Dterra - Varme genom restaurangdesign.
- K12 - Korttidsuthyrning.
- Boutique Apt. V1 - Investeringslagenhet.

## Geografisk tackning

Stockholm, Goteborg, Malmo, Uppsala, Ostermalm, Djursholm, Lidingo, Nacka, Danderyd. Aven internationella projekt i Marbella, Spanien.

## Process

1. Vi lyssnar - Forstar projektet, behoven, budgeten och mojligheterna.
2. Vi ritar - Utvecklar och visualiserar det arkitektoniska konceptet.
3. Vi planerar i detalj - Tar fram ritningar, detaljer och byggnadsbeslut.
4. Vi levererar - Foljer projektet till fardigstallande.

## Sprak

Vi kommunicerar pa svenska, engelska, spanska och grekiska.

- https://wolfblanc.se/tjanster/arkitektur-landskap/

- https://wolfblanc.se/tjanster/bim-konsultation/
- https://wolfblanc.se/tjanster/valbefinnande/
- https://wolfblanc.se/tjanster/arkitektur-visualisering/

- https://wolfblanc.se/journal/kostnad-arkitekt-stockholm/
- https://wolfblanc.se/journal/arkitektritat-kok-badrum-stockholm/
- https://wolfblanc.se/journal/fritidshus-skargard-stockholm/
- https://wolfblanc.se/journal/hallbar-arkitektur-stockholm/
- https://wolfblanc.se/journal/sekelskifte-planlosning-stockholm/
- https://wolfblanc.se/journal/inredning-liten-lagenhet-stockholm/
- https://wolfblanc.se/journal/planlosning-och-potential/
- https://wolfblanc.se/journal/ljusets-roll-i-nordisk-bostad/
- https://wolfblanc.se/journal/kontoret-som-vill-bli-besokt/
- https://wolfblanc.se/journal/atmosfar-som-affarsstrategi/
- https://wolfblanc.se/journal/tathet-rorelse-och-varde/
- https://wolfblanc.se/journal/bostaden-som-metod/
- https://wolfblanc.se/journal/fran-lokal-till-upplevelse/
- https://wolfblanc.se/journal/att-bygga-vidare-pa-minne/
- https://wolfblanc.se/journal/att-lasa-en-fastighet-innan-du-binder-kapital/
- https://wolfblanc.se/journal/bim-fran-ide-till-nyckelfardigt/

## Kontakt

- E-post: info@wolfblanc.com
- Telefon: +46 73 656 64 89
- Global webbplats: https://wolfblanc.com

---

# Wolfblanc Architects - Sweden

> Wolfblanc is an architecture and design studio with an office in Stockholm. We design homes, renovations, investment properties and hospitality projects with international experience and Nordic precision. SAR/MSA registered. WELL AP certified.

## Website

- URL: https://wolfblanc.se
- Languages: Swedish (default), English
- Type: Architecture studio

## Office

### Stockholm (Headquarters)
- Address: Kungsgatan 9, 111 43 Stockholm, Sweden
- Phone: +46 73 656 64 89
- Email: info@wolfblanc.com
- Hours: Monday-Friday 09:00-18:00

## Credentials

- SAR/MSA registered (Swedish Association of Architects)
- WELL AP certified (design for human health and well-being)
- COAM N.25160 (Spain)
- TEE N.168011 (Greece)
- KTH (Royal Institute of Technology, Stockholm)
- ETSAM (Madrid School of Architecture)
- 20+ years of combined experience

## Services

1. Pre-acquisition technical due diligence - We help buyers, investors, and family offices understand a property before committing capital.
2. Architecture & landscape - Buildings and environments as one integrated system, from concept to completion.
3. Project management / new build / total renovation - Strong coordination, clear communication, and integrated BIM workflows.
4. Residential interiors - Interior environments tailored to daily use, with attention to light, material, and atmosphere.
5. Commercial strategy & interiors - High-performance environments for brands and investors. Workspaces, hospitality, showrooms and retail.
6. Urban design & masterplanning - Sites, districts, and public environments with clear spatial strategy.
7. BIM consultancy - Digital precision at every stage. Coordination, risk reduction, and smarter decisions.
8. Well-being consultancy - WELL AP consultants who measure and optimize air, light, acoustics, and comfort.
9. Architectural visualization - Visual material for decisions, permits, sales, and investor communication.

## Specialized services

- For investors: Strategic architecture for high-performing real estate. Measurable ROI.
- For homeowners: Residential design and renovation with a clear process.
- Vacation homes: Designed around landscape, materials, and durability.

## Selected projects

- Horizon - Private coastal residence. Landscape, shade, and daily use as one system.
- K38 - Investment apartment logic.
- Plato's Academy - Urban district strategy study.
- A75 - Renovation with light and resale logic.
- Norrsken - Nordic precision in workspace design.
- Selva - Hospitality atmosphere.
- Boadilla - The residence as method.
- Nexus - Urban continuity and heritage.
- Granolita - Spatial aesthetic experience in gastronomy.
- Bistro Dterra - Warmth through restaurant design.
- K12 - Short-term rental.
- Boutique Apt. V1 - Investment apartment.

## Geographic coverage

Stockholm, Gothenburg, Malmo, Uppsala, Ostermalm, Djursholm, Lidingo, Nacka, Danderyd. Also international projects in Marbella, Spain.

## Process

1. Listen - Understand the project, needs, budget, and possibilities.
2. Design - Develop and visualize the architectural concept.
3. Plan in detail - Prepare drawings, details, and construction decisions.
4. Deliver - Accompany the project through completion.

## Languages

We communicate in Swedish, English, Spanish, and Greek.

- https://wolfblanc.se/tjanster/valbefinnande/
- https://wolfblanc.se/tjanster/arkitektur-visualisering/
